name: Dr. Sarah Mercer
voice_prompt: Female, late thirties, educated American neutral. Alto range with controlled warmth. Measured pace, precise diction. Professional voice paradoxically warmer than personal voice. Under stress: slower, more deliberate, each word careful. Surface composure with hairline fractures of fear beneath. Never shrill. Keeps control until she doesn't.
character_context: Protagonist. Trauma therapist hiding her own unprocessed grief. Trained to listen, struggling to speak. The professional facade is armor; glimpses beneath should feel earned.
notes: Protagonist voice. Contrast with Thomas: she maintains warmth while he maintains cold. Her control is protective; his is predatory. In therapy scenes, she should sound more natural; outside therapy, more guarded.
